title: Customer Stories
summary: How teams use Zyplo in production.
assetInstruction: Optional: add story landing visual at public/resources/stories-1.png.
body: These stories show how different organizations improved delivery consistency using Zyplo.
Each example focuses on setup choices, workflow changes, and measurable outcomes.
Use these stories as templates when designing your own rollout plan.

title: Startup Scaling Team
summary: From informal tracking to predictable weekly delivery.

subsections.title: Challenge
body: The team was coordinating features through chat and spreadsheets, causing missed handoffs and unclear ownership.
Status updates were inconsistent and sprint visibility was poor.

subsections.title: Solution
body: They consolidated work into one workspace, standardized board statuses, and enforced assignee discipline.
Notification rules were tuned so both assignee and assigner saw critical status changes.

subsections.title: Outcome
body: Planning overhead dropped significantly within one month.
Cycle predictability improved because blockers became visible earlier.

title: Enterprise Transformation
summary: Multi-team governance with cleaner execution data.

subsections.title: Challenge
body: Different departments used different task status names and reporting methods.
Leadership lacked a reliable cross-team view of execution health.

subsections.title: Solution
body: They introduced a shared status taxonomy and normalized status keys in backend workflows.
Activity tracking and notification logic were standardized across all project teams.

subsections.title: Outcome
body: Cross-team reporting became consistent enough for weekly portfolio reviews.
Operational incidents related to task ownership dropped due to clearer notification coverage.

subsections.title: Challenge
body: With teams across time zones, work was delayed by incomplete handoff notes and late status updates.
Important task changes were often discovered too late.

subsections.title: Solution
body: They adopted strict end-of-day status hygiene and improved task documentation standards.
Recent activity and live notification refresh were used as daily operational controls.

subsections.title: Outcome
body: Handoffs became faster and less ambiguous.
Execution continuity improved, even with minimal overlap between regions.
